hook.text: Reply to KLF2511's comment I had mine 6 months ago and now my pain in worse. Anyone else?
hook.target_audience_raw: People who have had endometriosis surgery and are experiencing worsening pain, or those considering surgery

main_claim.text: Surgery does not always improve endometriosis pain because pain is multimodal and may require additional treatments.

supporting_explanation.summary: The doctor explains that pain is caused by many factors, surgery might not be enough, possible inadequate surgery or assessment, and suggests discussing after six months about hormones or seeking another opinion.

funnel_rationale: Explains why surgery may not resolve pain, targeting those who have already undergone surgery and are considering next steps.

secondary_raw: Pain management after surgery, multimodal pain
